title: Days and muse
description: A short mask-and-duration artifact naming the pressure of long days, the difficulty of removing a persona, and the need for a quieter internal requirement.

motifMap.meaning: The mask names a persona that has become too tight to wear through the long stretch ahead.
The artifact faces duration without yet naming a full plan or outward declaration.
The final phrase marks a compact private requirement, more signal than explanation.

excerpt: The Bubba mask is too tight. I am struggling to take it off when the long days lay ahead.

associatedMedia.description: Screenshot of the published Substack post page, if available in the local screenshot archive. Screenshot capture remains optional provenance support and was not required for validation in this run.
associatedMedia.altText: A short Wanderer's Burn Substack post titled 'Days and muse' by Unnamed, published May 16, 2026, mentioning the Bubba mask, long days, and 3C.

editHistory.notes: Self-discovered v2.6.5 batch run. Classified as The Hollow with Signal Withdrawal because the artifact is brief, private, mask-focused, and suspended between identity states rather than outwardly resolved.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-05-16.days-and-muse.phase-the-hollow.subcurrent-signal-withdrawal.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Phase has no mapped v2.6.5 variant, so phase.variant is blank.
